name: telegram-completion-notifier
description: Send rich Codex completion summaries to Telegram using Bitwarden Secrets Manager.

interface.shortDescription: Send rich Codex completion summaries to Telegram.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin that runs a Stop hook, reads Codex rollout transcripts, fetches Telegram credentials from Bitwarden Secrets Manager, and sends a formatted completion summary with session metadata, request context, final outcome, touched files, and tool counts.
